case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. vs. GUDE, STEPHEN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUDE, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-22-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-23-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-04-2001
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2001 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-22-2001, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ANTHONY L HEAD., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-06-2001 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HEAD ANTHONY. HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HEAD ANTHONY. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-12-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ANTHONY L HEAD, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-27-2001 CONTINUED FROM SEP-12-2001 TO NOV-07-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-07-2001, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY HEAD ANTHONY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-26-2001 CONTINUED FROM NOV-07-2001 TO JAN-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2002, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ANTHONY L HEAD. HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
